headline: HII Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) today reported results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026. Highlights First quarter revenues were $3.1 billionFirst quarter net earnings were $149 million or $3.79 diluted earnings per shareCompleted builder’s sea trials for aircraft carrier John F. Kennedy (CVN 79)New collective bargaining agreements ratified at Ingalls Shipbuilding that extend through 2031Company reaffirms previously issued FY26 financial guidance1 First Qua
